title: The codes of our project "Improving Visual Relation Detection using Depth Maps" are now available on github Depth-VRD.
Started collaborating with Prof. Volker Tresp and Sahand Sharifzadeh on the research topic of Scene Graph Generation and Visual Relation Detection.
A new Vehicle Recognition web page with a Tensorflow.js demonstration has been launched: www.sinabaharlou.com/VehicleRecognition
The paper "Transfer learning approach for classification and noise reduction on noisy web data" is published on the journal of Expert Systems with Applications
The paper "Transfer learning approach for classification and noise reduction on noisy web data" has been accepted in the journal of Expert Systems with Applications
Submitted the Paper "Transfer learning approach for classification and noise reduction on noisy web data" to the journal of Expert Systems with Applications
Started working on the Vehicle Recognition Project
Graduated from Sapienza University of Rome
